use_cases: Display real-time API rate limiting status in developer dashboards
Monitor throttled versus allowed requests with visual indicators
Show API abuse protection status for infrastructure monitoring
Visualize server traffic patterns with animated graphics
Provide at-a-glance security status for SaaS platforms
ai_summary: An API rate limiting monitoring card component with animated server visualization that displays throttled and allowed request statuses. Features a dark minimalist design with continuous dot animation around a central server icon, status indicators using shield icons, and a list of recent API events. Designed for developer dashboards and infrastructure monitoring in SaaS and fintech applications.
